name: American Spin
preceding_figure_names: Catapult,Change of Hands Behind Back,Change of Places Left to Right,Chugging,Fallaway Throwaway,Hip Bump,Rolling Off the Arm,Shoulder Spin,Simple Spin,Spanish Arms,Stop and Go
following_figure_names: American Spin,Rolling Off the Arm,Miami Special,Shoulder Spin,Chugging,Catapult,Link,Change of Hands Behind Back,Stop and Go
notes:
Start in L to R hand hold.
Retain hold and lead lady to spin under raise arm on 5. Lower at end of lady's turn.

steps.action: Close LF near RF, slightly forward for compact chasse LRL
comments: retract R arm to lead lady fwd.
increase tone in arm on 5, then turn lady to R, release hold

steps.action: Compact chasse RLR, end in open position
comments: regain L to R or R to R hand hold at end of lady's turn

steps.action: Forward chasse RLR, then turn R on RF
comments: no turn on 3-5, then 1/2 to R on RF
Lady may turn up to 3/4 R on RF on 5, completing turn over 6-7.

steps.action: LF diagonal back to chasse LRL, end in open position, 1/4 to R over 6-8
comments: LF diag back to chasse LRL
end LF back in open position
